vision_results.expected: A SolidWorks mounting plate preview with rectangular body and four visible holes.
vision_results.observed: SolidWorks front view preview of a rectangular mounting plate, with four circular holes located at each of the four plate corners, and the SolidWorks coordinate origin triad visible at the center of the plate.
evidence: The image shows a solid horizontal rectangular plate body
Four distinct circular mounting holes are clearly visible at all four corners of the plate
The view matches standard SolidWorks part preview presentation

vision_results.expected: A SolidWorks mounting plate preview with rectangular body and four visible holes.
vision_results.observed: This is a SolidWorks isometric part preview of a flat rectangular mounting plate, with four circular through holes visible at each corner of the plate face, and the standard SolidWorks origin triad marker present on the plate surface.
evidence: The part is a solid rectangular prismatic plate body
Four circular through holes are clearly visible, positioned at each corner of the plate front face
The native SolidWorks origin/view triad is present, confirming this is a SolidWorks part preview

vision_results.expected: A SolidWorks side or edge projection of the mounting plate; holes may be hidden by the viewing direction, but the plate body must be visible.
vision_results.observed: This is a SolidWorks right side (edge) orthographic projection of the mounting plate. The thin rectangular plate body is fully clearly visible, and mounting holes are hidden from this viewing direction, consistent with expectation for this side view.
evidence: The solid black-outlined grey rectangular plate body matching the edge view of a flat mounting plate is fully visible in the viewport
No holes are visible, which is acceptable and expected for this side projection viewing direction

vision_results.expected: A SolidWorks side or edge projection of the mounting plate; holes may be hidden by the viewing direction, but the plate body must be visible.
vision_results.observed: This is a SolidWorks edge/side projection view of the mounting plate. The long thin rectangular plate body is fully visible. No holes appear in this view, which is consistent with an edge viewing direction that obscures through-holes.
evidence: Horizontal rectangular mounting plate body is clearly rendered in the SolidWorks viewport
View orientation matches the required side/edge projection
Absence of visible holes is explicitly allowed by the expected requirement
